title: WingmanConfig
description: Configuration for artists, venues, and location settings. Written by local UI, read by Cowork.

center_city.description: Center location for radius search, e.g. 'Des Moines, IA'

cities_in_range.description: Legacy: city names for text matching. Retained for backwards compatibility but geocoding is primary.

states_in_range.description: Legacy: state abbreviations for text matching. Retained for backwards compatibility but geocoding is primary.

artists.description: Map of artist name to artist config

venues.description: Map of venue name to venue config

genre.description: Genre category, e.g. 'Country / Americana', 'Indie / Alt-Rock', 'Electronic / Art-Rock'

paused.description: If true, artist is not scraped but still used for venue cross-reference

is_local.description: True if venue is in the local area (vs. travel destination)

paused.description: If true, venue is not scraped
